2026-02-27T12:34:28.9797708Z ##[group]Run # Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts
2026-02-27T12:34:28.9797970Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-02-27T12:34:28.9798114Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-02-27T12:34:28.9798318Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-02-27T12:34:28.9798652Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-02-27T12:34:28.9798764Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
2026-02-27T12:34:28.9798903Z [36;1m  awf logs summary | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"[0m
2026-02-27T12:34:28.9798986Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-02-27T12:34:28.9799175Z [36;1m  echo 'AWF binary not installed, skipping firewall log summary'[0m
2026-02-27T12:34:28.9799246Z [36;1mfi[0m
